E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

Additional Heater WBA

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 711
Recv ID: 731
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 1A
Func Name: Additional Heater

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "WBA",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 42240,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Add Heating - Internal Failure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42245,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Add Heating - Initial operation start in the plant"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42244,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Add Heating - System Overheat"
  },
  {

    "name": "Add Heating - Control Module Overheat"
  },

  },

  {

    "name": "Add Heating - Heater locked & Glow Plug"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42272,

    "name": "Production Mode Active"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42273,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Direct Button Stuck"
  }
]

    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "DTCStatus.pendingDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "DTCStatus.confirmedDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "DTCStatus.warningIndicatorRequested": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCFailureType.Category": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCFailureType": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCDeviceIdentifier": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCDeviceAndFailureTypeOBD": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCFailureType.ManufacturerOrSupplier": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatusAvailabilityMask": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
